metadata.description: Turkmen Licorice Co. — exporter of licorice roots & extracts produced in Turkmenistan.

footer.copyright: © {year} Turkmen Licorice Co. All rights reserved.

home.professionText: We are professional exporter of licorice roots and extracts produced in Turkmenistan.
home.historyParagraph1: We started our activity in early 2000s being a part of stuff of the state-owned unit AIC «Buyan» specializing on production of licorice.
home.historyParagraph2: Step by step we enriched our knowledge and experience in all stages of whole production cycle from cultivation and procurement of roots to storage of finished products in the warehouse.
home.historyParagraph3: We took part in modernization of unit and improvement of the technology taking into consideration requirements of the customers.
home.historyParagraph4: Later we elaborated entire export procedures and found ourselves capable to self-sufficient foreign trade in the ocean of international licorice business.
home.qualityParagraph1: The licorice we supply is grown in the floodplain of Amudaria river. It is well known for its unique properties all over the world.
home.qualityParagraph2: Every stage of the production cycle is controlled by experienced staff perfecting its skills for decades.
home.qualityParagraph3: Processing units, laboratories, calibration and testing points are strictly supervised by experts from Ministry of Health and Medical Industry of Turkmenistan.
home.offerItem4: Doing professional export arrangements in accordance to latest Incoterms
home.goalText: Long-term mutually beneficial co-operation in elegant and reliable way.
